svg.title: Patient Assistant — Full Architecture v3
svg.desc: Layered architecture with scope boundaries, human handoff, EMR standards, privacy safeguards, and real success metrics

g.text: Scope: intake · identity · triage · booking · escalation · follow-up only
Not a diagnosis system — designed for what hospitals can pilot and trust

svg.text: Layer 1 — how patients reach the system

g.text: Reads every message · detects intent · routes to right agent · Arabic and English
Asks only for what is missing · then continues

svg.text: Layer 4 — what does the patient need?

g.text: Always a human in the loop

svg.text: Layer 7 — how we measure success (real metrics)
Click any box to explore — pilot on one task first, then expand
